League Flex Showcases

Your Flex careers turned into player stories: signature picks, personal records, form arcs, and friendly rivalries.

New role-relative model: damage/min, gold/min, teamplay, vision, utility and objectives are compared with tracked players in the same role.

Dashboard Players Champions Combos Matches Showcases Experimental
